name: Mobiquity Technologies, Inc.
business: Mobiquity Technologies, Inc. is an advertising technology and data intelligence company that develops software platforms for digital advertising execution, audience analytics, and publisher monetization. It sells its platforms to advertisers, agencies, publishers, and enterprise clients through platform licensing and managed services.

exposures.sentence: Management believes Mobiquity is currently the only publicly traded advertising technology company with exposure to a programmatic advertising network integrated directly into casino gaming devices and related gaming infrastructure.
ATOS incorporates artificial intelligence ( AI ) and machine learning ( ML ) technologies to optimize campaign performance, automate inventory management, and improve audience targeting.

tamClaims.claim: Global programmatic advertising spending exceeded $595 billion in 2024 and is expected to surpass $800 billion by 2028.
tamClaims.sentence: Industry sources estimate global programmatic advertising spending exceeded $595 billion in 2024 and is expected to surpass $800 billion by 2028, with the United States representing the largest market.
